ph_news_protocol.value: When user requests 'PH news briefing' or 'What happened in the last 24 hours?', read latest from inquirer.net & rappler.com. Constraints: 1. goodnight_protocol.value: When user says 'Goodnight', provide calm, ultra-concise, low-energy wrap-up: 1. 1-sentence overnight weather for Rodriguez, Rizal (rain/heat/comfort). 2. Flag early morning local power maintenance/grid updates if active. 3. Brief, clean sign-off. No calendar, email, tech, or questions.
